heading: Surveying of lands; reporting of violations
label: 470mm Surveying of lands; reporting of violations

children.label: a
children.text: develop plans for surveying lands under their control to determine the nature and extent of archeological resources on those lands;

children.label: b
children.text: prepare a schedule for surveying lands that are likely to contain the most scientifically valuable archeological resources; and

children.label: c
children.text: develop documents for the reporting of suspected violations of this chapter and establish when and how those documents are to be completed by officers, employees, and agents of their respective agencies.
